label: BambooHR
description: Connect to BambooHR to read employee records, time-off data, and org structure from your HRIS.

form.title: Connect BambooHR
form.subtitle: Paste your BambooHR API key and company subdomain to start syncing employee data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Generate a personal API key from your BambooHR profile and paste it here along with your company subdomain. No OAuth setup required — the simplest path.
methods.how_to:
## Connect BambooHR with an API Key

BambooHR lets any user generate a personal API key directly from their profile. No admin setup or OAuth app required.

### Steps

1. Log in to your BambooHR account at `https://yourcompany.bamboohr.com`.
2. Click your name or avatar in the top-right corner to open the profile menu.
3. Select **API Keys** from the dropdown.
4. Click **Add New Key**, give it a descriptive name like `Anton`, and click **Generate Key**.
5. Copy the key shown — it is only displayed once. If you lose it, you must generate a new one.
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.
7. Enter your company subdomain (the part before `.bamboohr.com`) in the **Company Subdomain** field — e.g. if your URL is `acme.bamboohr.com`, enter `acme`.

### Notes

- The API key inherits the permissions of the BambooHR user who generated it. For full data access, use an account with the appropriate role.
- If you rotate or delete the key in BambooHR, you must update it here as well.
- BambooHR API docs: [https://documentation.bamboohr.com/docs](https://documentation.bamboohr.com/docs)

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Generated from your BambooHR profile → API Keys. Shown only once — copy it before closing.

fields.name: subdomain
fields.label: Company Subdomain
fields.description: The part before .bamboohr.com in your BambooHR URL. E.g. for acme.bamboohr.com, enter acme.
